name: whisperX
description: WhisperX:  Automatic Speech Recognition with Word-level Timestamps (& Diarization)
readme_summary: WhisperX is a Python-based Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system that enhances OpenAI's Whisper model by providing accurate word-level timestamps and speaker diarization. It leverages faster-whisper for efficient inference, wav2vec2 for alignment, and pyannote-audio for speaker identification, enabling fast, multi-speaker transcription with improved accuracy.
key_features: Accurate word-level timestamps via wav2vec2 alignment
Multispeaker ASR with speaker diarization from pyannote-audio
VAD preprocessing for reduced hallucination and batching without WER degradation
Low GPU memory requirement (<8GB for large-v2)
primary_use_case: To provide highly accurate, fast, and detailed speech-to-text transcriptions with precise word-level timing and speaker identification for audio and video content.
cover_image_prompt: A master clockmaker meticulously assembling a complex clockwork mechanism. Gears representing audio waves are being precisely placed, with each tiny gear segment labeled with a word. A magnifying glass reveals a clear, digital readout of the exact time for each word. Different colored threads connect segments, indicating different speakers. The clockmaker's workbench is cluttered with audio reels and small screens displaying waveforms and speaker labels. The overall scene is set in a well-lit, organized workshop, emphasizing precision and detail. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, highlighting the intricate process of timestamping and diarization.

name: docker-steam-headless
description: A Headless Steam Docker image supporting NVIDIA GPU and accessible via Web UI
readme_summary: This repository provides a Docker image for a headless Steam client, enabling remote game streaming. It supports NVIDIA GPU acceleration, web-based access via noVNC, and compatibility with Steam Link, Moonlight, and other game launchers.
key_features: Headless Steam Client with Proton support
Web UI with noVNC for browser access
NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPU support
Easy installation of EmeDeck, Heroic, and Lutris via Flatpak
Support for Flatpak and Appimage installation
primary_use_case: To easily deploy and run a headless Steam instance within a Docker container for remote game streaming and access.
cover_image_prompt: A cozy living room scene where a person is relaxing on a couch, holding a game controller. Instead of a traditional TV, a holographic projection emanates from a small, sleek black box (representing the Docker container) displaying a vibrant, action-packed video game. The holographic projection is clearly a stream of gameplay, with subtle digital particles flowing from the box to the projection. In the background, a subtle, stylized representation of the 'docker-steam-headless' logo is integrated into a piece of digital art on the wall. The overall mood is relaxed and futuristic, with soft, ambient lighting. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic.

name: free-llm-api-resources
description: A list of free LLM inference resources accessible via API.
readme_summary: This repository serves as a curated list of free API resources for accessing various Large Language Models (LLMs). It aims to provide developers with readily available, cost-free options for integrating LLM capabilities into their applications, including models from major providers and open-source alternatives.
key_features: Lists free LLM inference resources accessible via API
Categorizes providers into 'Free Providers' and 'Providers with trial credits'
Details limits and available models for each provider
primary_use_case: To discover and utilize free API endpoints for various Large Language Models, enabling developers to experiment with and integrate LLM functionalities without incurring costs.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a digital library where books are replaced by glowing LLM icons (like a stylized brain, a speech bubble, or a neural network). A friendly robot librarian is handing out these 'LLM books' to eager developers who are reaching out with open laptops. The library shelves are filled with data streams and code snippets. In the background, a subtle 'Free Access' sign is visible. The overall mood is one of discovery and accessibility, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with bright, inviting colors and clear, simple iconography.

name: monty
description: A minimal, secure Python interpreter written in Rust for use by AI
readme_summary: Monty is a minimal and secure Python interpreter written in Rust, designed to safely execute Python code generated by AI agents. It offers fast startup times and controlled execution, avoiding the overhead of containerized sandboxes.
key_features: Minimal and secure Python interpreter in Rust
Controlled execution with resource limits (memory, stack, time)
Blocks host environment access (filesystem, env, network) by default
primary_use_case: Safely executing AI-generated Python code within an agent or application, providing a controlled and efficient sandbox.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, the 'Monty' interpreter, meticulously crafting intricate clockwork mechanisms from raw, unrefined digital clay (AI-generated code). Each piece of clay is carefully shaped, with only specific tools (allowed functions) being used, while dangerous elements (host access) are kept at bay by a shimmering force field. The finished clockwork pieces are precise and functional, ready to be integrated into a larger machine. Subtle glowing circuit patterns and small, abstract UI elements representing execution status are visible around the artisan. The scene is set in a clean, minimalist workshop with a soft, focused light. 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of blues, grays, and subtle gold accents.

name: shannon
description: Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.
readme_summary: Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes source code to identify potential attack vectors and then executes real exploits to validate vulnerabilities before they reach production, providing reproducible proof-of-concept exploits.
primary_use_case: Automated, white-box penetration testing of web applications and APIs.
cover_image_prompt: A diligent digital locksmith, wearing a sleek, modern uniform with subtle circuit patterns, is meticulously examining the blueprints of a complex digital castle. Using a glowing, multi-faceted key, the locksmith is testing various entry points on the castle walls, which are represented by lines of code. Some points glow red, indicating a found vulnerability, while others glow green, showing they are secure. Small, holographic screens around the locksmith display snippets of code and the repository name 'Shannon'. The scene is set in a clean, futuristic workshop with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing precision and security. The overall style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear iconography and a professional, high-tech aesthetic.
